---
title: "2020771 - SEMINARIO II"
subtitle: "Academic Year: 2026"
format: html
---

::: {.callout-important collapse=false}
## 📢 Primer borrador del artículo

(02/03/2026)

- 🗓️ Work on processing and analyzing your experimental data

:::


::: {.callout-important collapse=true}
## 📢 Primer borrador del artículo

(17/02/2026)

- 🗓️ Submit the first draft of your article by February 24  with your supervisor's signature.


:::


::: {.callout-important collapse=true}
## 📢 Very important!

(09/02/2026)

- 🗓️ Get the approval from you supervisor for the three documents(workplan, paper's outline, and Introduction)


:::

# 🧑🏻‍🏫 Our Team

::: {.panel-tabset}
## Course Convenor


![](../figures/people/ials.png){fig-align="left" fig-alt="Photo of IVAN LIZARAZO" style="object-fit: cover;width:6em;height:6em;border-radius: 50%;"}  
**IVAN LIZARAZO** <br/>
_ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR_ <br/>
UNAL</a><br/>
📧 [ializarazos@unal.edu.co](mailto:)

Office Hours: 

- When: Tuesdays 11:00 am - 12:00 m
- Where: Sala de Profesores
- How to book: via e-mail

## Teaching Staff

**IALS**

:::

# 📍 Dates - Location

Tuesday 2pm-6pm at SALON 304
